code: import axios from"axios";const API=axios.create({baseURL:"http://week4day1-w3yt.vercel.app/api"});export const getTasks=async()=>{const res=await API.get("/tasks");return res.data;};export const createTask=async data=>{const res=await API.post("/tasks",data);return res.data;};export const toggleTask=async id=>{const res=await API.put(`/tasks/${id}`);return res.data;};export const removeTask=async id=>{await API.delete(`/tasks/${id}`);};
